stemHtml: One advantage of having three instead of two spools in some high-bypass turbofan engine is that…

options.a: fewer variable stator vanes and variable inlet guide vanes are required to prevent compressor stall at high rotor speeds.
options.b: there is a lower fuel consumption due to a higher overall pressure ratio.
options.c: there is a lower fuel consumption and more thrust due to higher overall pressure ratio.
options.d: fewer variable stator vanes and variable inlet guide vanes are required to prevent compressor stall at low rotor speeds.
